title: Intense Uruguayan Tobiko Pasta
description: A cultured and molten Uruguayan dish featuring tobiko, perfect for a pescatarian hangover cure, infused with flavorful oil. This dish combines the best of Uruguayan cuisine with Japanese tobiko for a unique taste experience.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the infuse oil over medium heat and add the cherry tomatoes, cooking until they start to release their juices.
Add the tobiko to the skillet and stir gently to combine with the tomatoes and oil.
Drain the cooked spaghetti and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the tobiko and tomato mixture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with grated parmesan cheese.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
This dish is best served hot, straight from the skillet.
To enhance the flavors, let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
